base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pols_voice_hop — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Pols Voice — pink rabbit-creature with big ears. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pols Voice — pink rabbit-creature with big ears; 2-frame hop. Weak to arrows (and flute sound in JP version — hardware quirk tied to microphone input)
